LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HURST'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HURST'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PLAINTIFF HAS COMPLIED WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.770 BY FILING A DECLARATION SETTING FORTH IN DETAIL THE CONSIDERATION BEING GIVEN FOR THE DISMISSAL. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED IN CAMERA THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HURST INDIVIDUALLY AND DEFENDANTS ONE KINGS LANE LLC AND BED BATH & BEYOND INC. THE COURT HAS NOT RULED ON CLASS CERTIFICATION AND NOTICE OF THE PENDENCY OF THE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN PROVIDED TO PUTATIVE CLASS MEMBERS, AND FINDS THAT THE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THE CLASS CLAIMS WILL NOT PREJUDICE SUCH CLASS MEMBERS. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HURST'S Motion For Dismissal.

Plaintiff Elizabeth Hurst's motion for dismissal is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown. Plaintiff has complied with the requirements of California Rule of Court 3.770 by filing a declaration setting forth in detail the consideration being given for the dismissal. The Court has reviewed in camera the settlement agreement between Plaintiff Elizabeth Hurst individually and Defendants One Kings Lane LLC and Bed Bath & Beyond Inc. The Court has not ruled on class certification and notice of the pendency of the action has not been provided to putative class members, and finds that the dismissal without prejudice of the class claims will not prejudice such class members.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Continued To Aug-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH HURST'S Motion For Dismissal.

Continued on the Court's own motion to August 2, 2019. Plaintiff Elizabeth Hurst shall provide the written settlement agreement with Defendant to the Court for review in camera. Once the Court has reviewed the settlement agreement, it will issue a tentative ruling prior to the August 2 hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
